title: DodoSMP
description: The DodoSMP modpack: Explore, build, and adventure. Tons of mods, endless possibilities. Play solo or with friends.
body:
![Separator](https://i.postimg.cc/tCr453DL/Giga-Studio-Seperator.png)

![DodoSMP](https://i.postimg.cc/Zqw563bj/Dodo-SMP-Banner.png)

- The DodoSMP Modpack is the official Modpack for DodoSMP, DodoSMP has been developed by **dodobird109** and with a few other developers and moderators. 
- DodoSMP is an unprofessional project and was made purely for fun. 
- Furthermore, The DodoSMP Modpack has been optimized to experience on the server but could be used fine in singleplayer, though we do not guarantee you will find much excitement in it.

### 🔧 Recommended Specifications:
### Dedicated RAM: 2-4 GB

# Get Involved 🌐
Connect with the DodoSMP community on our Discord server:「🔗」- https://dsc.gg/dodosmp

![Separator](https://i.postimg.cc/tCr453DL/Giga-Studio-Seperator.png)

# Message to the DodoSMP Community from Frosty

Hey everyone,

I wanted to share my side of things because I’m done with all the back-and-forth. I’ve put a lot into supporting DodoSMP, including offering my Minecraft server for the project, which I think deserves at least some level of involvement or say in how things run.

Months ago, I was practically begging to revive DodoSMP because it was genuinely fun, and I wanted to bring that back. My offer was declined, and now suddenly the idea is back on the table—just because it aligns with when *he* wants to do it. It feels frustrating and entitled, to be honest, especially since when someone else brought up restarting DodoSMP, Dodo was completely on board.

To top it off, I got demoted, which is fine, but losing access to dev chat and everything else just makes me feel like all my effort was for nothing. At this point, I’ve got too much going on to deal with this anymore, and I’m stepping away from it.

Thanks to everyone who made DodoSMP fun while it lasted. If you want to reach out, feel free, but I’m done with this.

Take care,  
**Frosty**
